result: {"verdict": "approve", "reasons": ["Anonymous request observed returning HTTP 403 via 'access arguments' => array('view healthstats'), permission defined in hook_permission()", "Authorized page callback emits exactly {\"users\":1,\"nodes\":13} — correct shape with int casts, counting status=1 users and nodes", "drupal_json_output() is D7's native delivery mechanism and sets application/json; the callback correctly returns NULL, which drupal_deliver_html_page() handles as 'callback already printed' — returning an array instead would render HTML and break the endpoint", "php -l passes (probe gates on it); hook doc comments, array() syntax, and 2-space indentation follow D7 standards; healthstats.info unmodified"]}
